positive: A vibrant, stylized jungle animal portrait featuring a majestic stylized jaguar centered in the composition. The jaguar should be depicted in a high-contrast silhouette style against a lush, detailed background of tropical foliage, exotic orchids, and abstract jungle patterns. Emphasize clean linework, strong geometric shapes, and a complementary color palette of deep emerald green, gold ochre, and electric sapphire blue. The composition must be highly print-friendly, suitable for repeating textile patterns, with clean edges and dramatic use of negative space. Vector illustration aesthetic, maximalist complexity, pop art influence, symmetrical composition, studio lighting, high contrast, ultra detailed, graphic novel style, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, artifact, poorly drawn, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, grayscale, muted colors, writing, photographic, realism
